steps.t: Raphûz and Ashâmi intend to leave Urmâkh to return to Lathagwid. They ask that you go to Shonith to share your description with Lathagwid. She may kno…
Lathagwid could not recall a foe in all her long life. She told Ashâmi and Raphûz there is a dead land north of Imhûlar but could recall nothing more.…
Ashâmi is frightened and inspired by what she heard and what you have seen. She asked for time to think apart from Raphûz and determine the path she w…
